title: pityrogramma aurantiaca
intro: Pityrogramma aurantiaca, also known as the golden-tipped fern or orange-tipped fern, is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pityrogramma aurantiaca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. The plant is typically prepared in the form of a tea or tincture, with its herbal preparations also including infusions and decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
